entity.label: Helon
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Strong, father of Eliab, who was “captain of the children of Zebulun” (Num. 1:9; 2:7).

nodes.label: Helon
nodes.description: Strong, father of Eliab, who was “captain of the children of Zebulun” (Num. 1:9; 2:7).

nodes.label: Eliab
nodes.description: A son of Helon, and chief of the tribe of Zebulun at the time of the census in the wilderness (Num. 1:9; 2:7).

verses.text: Of Zebulun; Eliab the son of Helon.
Then the tribe of Zebulun: and Eliab the son of Helon shall be captain of the children of Zebulun.
On the third day Eliab the son of Helon, prince of the children of Zebulun, did offer:
And for a sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he goats, five lambs of the first year: this was the offering of Eliab the son of Helon.
And over the host of the tribe of the children of Zebulun was Eliab the son of Helon.
